final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit down/up counter that decrements or increments its count based on the Up and Down control signals, respectively. The counter resets to zero when the Reset signal is asserted and updates its value on the rising edge of the Clock signal. When Up is high, the count decreases by one; when Down is high, the count increases by one, allowing for dynamic counting in both directions.
module top_module(
    input Up,
    input Down,
    input Clk,
    input Reset,
    output reg [3:0] Count
);always @(posedge Clk) begin
        if (Reset) begin
            Count <= 4'b0;
        end else if (Up) begin
            Count <= Count + 1;
        end else if (Down) begin
            Count <= Count - 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

When Up is high, the count decreases by one; when Down is high, the count increases by one, allowing for dynamic counting in both directions.
